title: redstono's guns
description: this mod adds three powerful firearms—Gun, TNT Gun, and Atomic Gun—alongside a new crafting material called Gun Steel. The basic Gun provides reliable ranged damage, the TNT Gun launches explosive shots, and the Atomic Gun triggers massive blasts
body:
this mod adds the
- Gun
A reliable starter firearm, automatic, crafted from Gun Steel. Ideal for ranged defense and testing mob aggro at a distance.
- TNT Gun
Launches TNT bullets that explode on impact. Great for crowd control or turning terrain into Swiss cheese. Handle with caution indoors.
- Atomic Gun
A rare, ultra-destructive weapon that unleashes a mini-nuke blast. Vaporizes entities and alters the environment—perfect for late-game chaos or sci-fi builds.
- Gun Steel
A new alloy crafted from netherite, diamand, and coal used to forge the base gun

I recomend you use jei for the recipes


anybody can use this mod in any modpack
